name: Matt David
subject: ALERT: Trump Threatens Lawsuit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW DAY FOR AMERICA NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=108404&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.newdayforamerica.com%2Fdonate) Friend, Donald Trump is threatening to sue us and we need your help! **SUPPORT THE TRUTH ABOUT TRUMP LEGAL DEFENSE FUND** [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=108404&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.newdayforamerica.com%2Fdonate) Just hours after we released [our latest ad](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=108404&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.NewDayForAmerica.com%2FCommanderInChief), “Commander In Chief,” and this [POLITICO story](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=108404&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.politico.com%2Fstory%2F2015%2F11%2Fgop-group-plans-most-aggressive-anti-trump-campaign-yet-216085) questioned Donald Trump's ability to effectively lead our country as commander in chief, Donald Trump did what he's done his whole life: He unleashed his corporate lawyers on us. Can you believe it? [You can read the letter from Trump's corporate lawyer for yourself](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=108404&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fnewdayforamerica.com%2Fnews%2Fdonald-trump-threatens-to-sue-new-day-for-america%2F). [**WATCH OUR LATEST AD TO SEE WHY TRUMP’S SO NERVOUS**](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=108404&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.NewDayForAmerica.com%2FCommanderInChief) [****](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=108404&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.NewDayForAmerica.com%2FCommanderInChief) This is just the latest of Trump’s many antics that prove he is ill-prepared to lead our nation as commander in chief and making it even more clear that we need a strong leader like Governor John Kasich in the White House. Donald Trump can try to bully his way to the presidency but we will do our part to share the truth about what America under a Trump Administration would look like. Help us fight back against Trump's Legal Machine. Support The Truth About Trump Legal Defense Fund today! [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=108404&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.newdayforamerica.com%2Fdonate) **Matt David**
Target of Trump's Lawyers & New Day For America Chief Strategist | Please [click here](https://app.icontact.com/icp/mmail-mprofile.pl?r=35444401&l=20193&s=N28F&m=108404&c=1559159) if you wish to unsubscribe to these emails.

name: Team Katie
subject: If you're ready
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

It's simple: It's time for new leadership for Pennsylvania. Right now Washington is being run by extremist Republicans who will stop at nothing to roll back the progress we've made. That's why we need Katie, a leader who will put families first every single day and will never stop fighting to make sure all Pennsylvanians get a fair shot at achieving the American dream.

As Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator, Katie will advocate for women's rights, protect Medicare and Social Security, and work tirelessly to make college more affordable for our kids.

**If you 're ready to elect Katie to the U.S. Senate, chip in right now. In a grassroots campaign like this, even $5 can make a huge difference.**
| **[$5](https://act.myngp.com/el/-171776598528229376/188327650140356608?refcode=e20151122&refcode2=e20151122nd&amount=5 "#")** | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/-171776598528229376/188327650140356608?refcode=e20151122&refcode2=e20151122nd&amount=10)**

**[$100](https://act.myngp.com/el/-171776598528229376/188327650140356608?refcode=e20151122&refcode2=e20151122nd&amount=100)** | **[Other](https://act.myngp.com/el/-171776598528229376/188327650140356608?refcode=e20151122&refcode2=e20151122nd)**

Thanks for chipping in,

Team Katie

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-171776598528229376/188327650140356608?refcode=e20151122&refcode2=e20151122nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Team Murphy
subject: We're feeling blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

The latest poll has Patrick neck-and-neck with potential Republican candidates in the general election.

This is further proof of what we've been saying all along. **Patrick Murphy is our best chance at taking Florida and the Senate for Democrats in 2016.**

We know it may seem early to be stressing about too-close-to-call polls with the election a little less than a year away, but the work we do now is what will make the biggest difference in November. What happens now will determine if we have the staying power to win back the Senate and turn Florida blue.

[**We need your support to make sure Patrick pulls away. This is our chance to take back Florida and the Senate. Can you help us with a $5 contribution?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21d6/738133e4/3a2ac55e/7f8342e5/3506404031/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151122?refcode=pme151122_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Of course, it's no secret that it all comes down to this race. _Bloomberg Business_ said it best with the headline, **" The War for the Senate will be Decided in Florida."**

And the Koch Brothers know it, too. They've taken a special interest (pun intended) in Florida and have already attacked Patrick. The Kochs know what's at stake. Unfortunately, they also have inexhaustible bank accounts to back them up.

_That 's why we have to rely on strength in numbers._ When Patrick was a teenager working on construction sites with his dad, he learned the importance of building upon a deep, carefully laid foundation.

[**We 're building that foundation right now. Lay the groundwork for a Democratic victory in Florida and the Senate by giving what you can to help us win.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21d6/738133e4/3a2ac55e/7f8342e5/3506404031/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151122?refcode=pme151122_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thank you,

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21d6/738133e4/3a2ac55e/7f8342e6/3506404031/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21d6/738133e4/3a2ac55e/7f8342e7/3506404031/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: Official Bernie 2016
subject: Can you add your name to Bernie's Syrian refugee petition today?
body:
The response to Bernie's email in the last 48 hours has been incredible.
Our movement is proving that now is the time to stand with refugees fleeing violence -- not give in to the racism and bigotry being spouted by Republican candidates. [**Can you add your name to Bernie 's petition today?**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2620/43f17890/51a53a1b/62196ab7/1664619323/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/support-refugees?source=em151122full")
See Bernie's original email to you below:
* * *
#
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2620/43f17890/51a53a1b/62196ab4/1664619323/VEsE/ "http://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/support-refugees?source=em151122full")
Brothers and Sisters -
My father Eli immigrated to America from Poland in 1921 after World War I at the age of 17. He was not a refugee fleeing war, although much of his family later became victims of the Holocaust. He came to America looking to make a better life. He never made a lot of money, but it didn't matter because he was able to start a family and send his two sons to college. That meant the world to him and he loved this country.
While my father came here as an immigrant, many have also come as refugees fleeing war, oppression and violence. That's why I opposed the call of some to turn away unaccompanied children who showed up on our borders from Latin America. We must not allow the horrific violence we have seen in France and elsewhere to turn us from our historic role as a haven for the oppressed.
**In terms of the Syrian refugee situation we are now facing, now is not the time for us to succumb to racism and bigotry.** In this moment, it is particularly important that we not allow ourselves to be divided by the anti-immigrant hysteria that Republican presidential candidates are ginning up.
When hundreds of thousands of people have lost everything and have nothing left but the shirts on their backs, **we should not turn our backs on these refugees escaping violence in the Middle East.** Of course we have to investigate the backgrounds of people coming into the country -- and we will -- but to suggest that we would even turn away orphans is incredible.
[**Sign my petition to say you support continuing the refugee program that promises to resettle 10,000 Syrians, mostly women and children, who are escaping violence in their home country.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2620/43f17890/51a53a1b/62196ab7/1664619323/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/support-refugees?source=em151122full")
The rhetoric and fear mongering about these refugees from some Republicans running for President is abhorrent and has no place in our political discourse.
Donald Trump has not just called for keeping out Syrian refugees, he also said he thinks it's a good idea to create a national database of all Muslims in America. Meanwhile, Ben Carson said some Syrian refugees are like "rabid dogs" and referred to the rest of Syrian refugees as just "dogs." This disgusting rhetoric cannot be tolerated.
Other Republicans have suggested rounding up existing refugees and deporting them. And yesterday afternoon, the House of Representatives voted on a plan that would make it near impossible for the United States to continue our Syrian refugee program.
**This is not what America stands for.**
Syrians and other refugees from the Middle East are escaping unspeakable horrors. To get to our country, refugees already go through a vigorous vetting program by the FBI, National Counterterrorism Center, Homeland Security and the State Department. The process takes almost two years and refugees from Syria face additional scrutiny.
**We should continue our program to provide Syrians fleeing violence with the opportunity for a new life. I hope you 'll join me to stand together to admit Syrian refugees. Sign my petition here:**
[**https://go.berniesanders.com/support-refugees**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2620/43f17890/51a53a1b/62196ab7/1664619323/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/support-refugees?source=em151122full")
Thank you for standing with me and making your voice heard on this important issue.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Sign our petition](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2620/43f17890/51a53a1b/62196ab7/1664619323/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/support-refugees?source=em151122full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2620/43f17890/51a53a1b/62196ab5/1664619323/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2620/43f17890/51a53a1b/62196ab2/1664619323/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2620/43f17890/51a53a1b/62196ab3/1664619323/VEsO/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2620/43f17890/51a53a1b/62196ab0/1664619323/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Hillary and I want to meet you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Meet Hillary and me in Washington? | Friend --

After almost seven years in the Senate, I can tell you one thing with 100 percent certainty: When Democratic women senators get together, it’s something you don’t want to miss.

In a few weeks, 13 of us are doing just that for a very special cause: electing Hillary as our next president. Hillary will be there, and you could be, too! **[All you have to do is add your name for a chance to win a free trip for you and a guest to meet us in Washington.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=30&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I’m proud that the women of the Senate stand together to fight for causes we believe in, whether it’s helping Americans get access to affordable health care or helping one of our own get to the White House. I’m grateful that you’re part of this fight, too -- and I would love to meet you in person to thank you (and introduce you to Hillary!).

**I hope you’ll join Hillary, 12 of my women colleagues, and me in Washington. It’s going to be a great night, and I would love for you to be there:
** [ | | [**Add your name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Kirsten Gillibrand

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 11/2/15 and 11/24/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=35&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without donating. One winner and a guest will receive special invitations to attend official campaign event in Washington, D.C. with Hillary and Democratic women senators, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Washington, D.C., and (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1650). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=33&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=34&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjQwNTYwMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMjI1MjkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: Meet Hillary and me in Washington? | Friend -- After almost seven years in the Senate, I can tell you one thing with 100 percent certainty: When Democratic women senators get together, it’s something you don’t want to miss. In a few weeks, 13 of us are doing just that for a very special cause: electing Hillary as our next president. Hillary will be there, and you could be, too! I’m proud that the women of the Senate stand together to fight for causes we believe in, whether it’s helping Americans get access to affordable health care or helping one of our own get to the White House. I’m grateful that you’re part of this fight, too -- and I would love to meet you in person to thank you (and introduce you to Hillary!). I hope you’ll join Hillary, 12 of my women colleagues, and me in Washington. It’s going to be a great night, and I would love for you to be there: --- ]() Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 11/2/15 and 11/24/15. Enter by contributing or click to enter without donating. One winner and a guest will receive special invitations to attend official campaign event in Washington, D.C. with Hillary and Democratic women senators, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Washington, D.C., and (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1650). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
